data.name: Family Island - Season 1
data.detailed_description:
You’ve always been the outcast in your family. Living under their roof hasn’t been easy. Cold shoulders, tense conversations, and feeling like you’re always on the outside looking in have become part of your daily life. It’s a struggle to find your place in a family that seems to thrive on appearances and quiet judgment. But for better or worse, this is your family, and leaving isn’t an option.

Plans are announced for a family trip to a tropical island. It’s meant to be a break from the usual routine, a chance for everyone to relax, bond, and reconnect. For you, it feels like an opportunity—maybe even a fresh start. This trip could be your chance to experience your family in a completely different way, away from the mansion and all its unspoken rules.

But nothing is ever simple with your family. Whether it’s learning to navigate old grudges, reconnecting with relatives you’ve grown distant from, or figuring out your own place in it all, this journey promises to be anything but ordinary. From the sprawling mansion to the distant shores of the island, every moment brings new challenges, unexpected connections, and a deeper understanding of what it means to be part of a family.

Step into a story about family dynamics, personal growth, and the unique experiences that come with being part of a world that’s as complicated as it is captivating. Your journey is only just beginning.

data.short_description: “Family Island” is an immersive adult visual novel where family ties and hidden truths collide. Over two weeks, uncover secrets, build relationships, and navigate complex choices that shape the story. Will you bring your family together or tear them apart?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 402 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
